creator: rum1cro@yandex.ru
text:
[sysutils/rsyslog5] patch for moving to optionsng

Fix: diff -Nru rsyslog5_old/Makefile rsyslog5/Makefile
--- rsyslog5_old/Makefile       2013-05-07 20:43:36.157707306 +0400
+++ rsyslog5/Makefile   2013-05-07 20:48:18.367707321 +0400
@@ -40,13 +40,15 @@
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 USES=          pkgconfig

-OPTIONS=       DEBUG   "Enable debugging"      off
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=        DEBUG
+DEBUG_DESC=    Enable debugging

-.ifdef WITH_DEBUG
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDEBUG}
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-rtinst --enable-debug
 .endif

-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 .if ${ARCH} == "i386"
 CPPFLAGS+=-march=i686
 .endif


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: install it ^_^
